data.body: CHECKPOINT 2026-07-13 (epic f1fa auto-lander landing + hardening). DRIFT TASK DONE: terraform user_data drift was PR#112 comment-only WS8 OAuth, unapplied since 07-01, NOT lander-related (0 to add); applied in-place (0/1/0), Gerrit stayed 200, plan now empty, noted on c7d4. EPIC: #624(S3 0525)/#626(S5d 38be)/#627(S5b ea61) all MERGED (origin/main ee49b4a89); bot redeployed (SSM 7ca5f4d3 Success), status HTTP200 heartbeat~6 idle. Closing 38be+ea61 found 4 REAL verifier gaps: A=heartbeat test bypassed GET /autolander/status, B=no drain-autoheal-race test, C=token comment said OPTIONAL (code already get_param), D=smoke-check dropped auth+membership read-only checks. Fixed ALL in change #641 (Change-Id I047f03cbb0493fb87de5a0cb1c279a94119801a6, commit b046543d6, branch fix-s5d-completion): extracted make_status_server/healthcheck_ok+healthcheck_main/handle_sigterm module-scope (run_loop unchanged), Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK->healthcheck_ok, 2 new tests, get_param comments, smoke-check auth+membership, README landing pointer. 76 autolander tests+lint+typecheck green, loop.py 766 LOC. NEXT: wait #641 gates -> land (FFO rebase if needed) -> redeploy (Dockerfile change) -> close 38be+ea61 -> 3c55(S5) -> 0525(S3)+0ee8(S2) -> epic f1fa. bug 0d3e (Autosubmit dropped on bot rebase) = filed future work. Close from ~/rebar-autolander/.venv/bin/rebar (global rebar lacks agents extra).
